instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English में translate करें। Future Perfect tense (will have + V3) का उपयोग करें। अपना answer लिखें, फिर 'Reveal Answer' button दबाएं।

questions.hindi: शुक्रवार तक मैं रिपोर्ट जमा कर दूँगा।
questions.english: By Friday, I will have submitted the report.
alternatives: I will have submitted the report by Friday.
questions.hint: By + day + I will have + V3
questions.explanation: Future Perfect: will have + submitted (submit का V3)। 'By Friday' = deadline।
questions.grammarRule: By [time], I will have + [V3]
